stepHint.noServerSync: Presets will appear after syncing with the server.

apply.noChanges: Write completed, but no changes were detected — the values already match the preset.
apply.engineNote: Warning: Engine.ini was present in the preview but the file was not written — close the game and try again.
apply.success_one: Preset applied: {{files}} ({{count}} change). Restart the game.{{engineNote}}
apply.success_other: Preset applied: {{files}} ({{count}} changes). Restart the game.{{engineNote}}

empty.selectGameDesc: Author presets are available only for games curated by the author (e.g. Forza). Select such a game in the library.

configMissing.title: Config not found — {{name}}
configMissing.forza: Launch Forza Horizon 6 once — UserConfigSelections is needed in AppData. Then specify the ForzaUserConfigSelections folder in the library.
configMissing.default: Specify the Saved/Config/Windows folder in the library or launch the game once to generate ini.

forzaInfo.title: Presets by the app author
forzaInfo.body: Profiles from the FH6 Graphics Presets mod: UserConfigSelections + media-override. Resolution, HDR and volume are not overwritten.

noPresets.title: No presets
noPresets.body: Presets did not load. Check your internet connection and restart the app.

step2.title: Preview changes
step2.mediaOverrideBody: The preset will also overwrite files in the game's media/ folder — DefaultTrackSettings, routebudget, distant trees and GlobalCarAttributes.
